title: Polygon closed in 2D viewport — semi-transparent fill overlay visible
capture_instructions: After clicking the first vertex to close the polygon, the polygon should show a closed outline and a semi-transparent fill overlay indicating the selected area. Points inside the polygon should be highlighted. The Confirm selection button should be visible in the 2D panel header/overlay at this point (or about to appear).
ui_state: Reclassify Points active, Polygon mode, polygon closed in 2D viewport, fill overlay visible, points inside highlighted, Confirm button visible in 2D panel

annotations.label: Closed polygon with semi-transparent fill overlay
Confirm selection button in 2D panel header
Confirm button location — inside 2D panel overlay
